summary: Frontend testing for AdminRouteGuard 403 bug fix and listing flow settings features. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Added missing RBAC route rule for /admin/site-design/listing-flow-settings. All requested features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: ROOT CAUSE FOUND & FIXED: The 403 error was caused by missing RBAC route rule in adminRbac.js. The path /admin/site-design/listing-flow-settings was not in ADMIN_ROUTE_RULES array, so resolveAdminRouteRoles() returned null, which AdminLayout converted to ['__deny__'] role. Added the rule: { pattern: /^\/admin\/site-design\/listing-flow-settings$/, roles: ['super_admin', 'country_admin'] }
AdminRouteGuard retry logic was working correctly - the issue was RBAC configuration, not timing
Route redirect from /admin/system-settings/listing-flow-settings to /admin/site-design/listing-flow-settings works correctly via full page navigation
TR/DE label switching for address preview working correctly (Sokak / Cadde <-> Straße, Kapı No <-> Hausnummer)
Sidebar menu 'İlan Ver Akış Ayarları' correctly visible under Site İç Tasarımı section
User address form on /ilan-ver/detaylar correctly shows disabled message when admin config is inactive - this is expected behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminRouteGuard 403 bug is FIXED. The missing RBAC rule was the root cause. Verified: listing-flow-settings page loads correctly with İlan Ver Akış Ayarları card, route redirect works, sidebar menu visible, TR/DE labels switch correctly. User address form disabled message is expected until admin enables the address block.
rca_of_the_issue: The 403 error was NOT a timing/race condition issue. The actual root cause was that the new route /admin/site-design/listing-flow-settings was added to BackofficePortalApp.jsx but NOT added to the ADMIN_ROUTE_RULES array in /app/frontend/src/shared/adminRbac.js. AdminLayout uses resolveAdminRouteRoles() which returned null for this path. When roles is null, AdminLayout sets enforcedRoles to ['__deny__'], causing AdminRouteGuard to always reject. FIX: Added { pattern: /^\/admin\/site-design\/listing-flow-settings$/, roles: ['super_admin', 'country_admin'] } to ADMIN_ROUTE_RULES.
